turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Visiting a Medical Clinic and Booking or Changing an Appointment

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Hi, um, I want to ask about making appointment to see doctor. Actually, I’m not sure if I should come in or call, so I’m calling first.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s totally fine, you’ve called the right place. I can help you book an appointment. Is this for a new appointment, or are you changing an existing one?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: New appointment. I didn’t come before, so… yeah, new one.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No problem at all. Could you tell me a little bit about the reason for your visit?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. I have sore throat and coughing. It started maybe three days ago, but yesterday was more uncomfortable. Not very serious, but annoying.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Okay, thanks for explaining that. Are you looking to see a doctor as soon as possible, or are you flexible with timing?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I prefer today, but I understand maybe today is full. So tomorrow is also okay. But if possible, morning is better because I work in the afternoon.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Let me check availability for you. We have an appointment tomorrow at am with one of our GPs. Would that suit you?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s  in the morning.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, good. Because sometimes I confuse  and , so I just wanted to be sure.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s completely understandable. So shall I book you in for am tomorrow?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes, please. But before confirming, can I ask something?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Of course, go ahead.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: I’m international student, so I don’t have Medicare. I have OSHC instead. Is that okay here?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that’s absolutely fine. We accept Overseas Student Health Cover.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, that’s good. Do I need to pay first, or after?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’ll pay after the appointment. The doctor will let you know the cost, and you can claim through your OSHC provider.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Claim meaning… I get money back later?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, exactly. You usually submit a receipt to your insurance provider.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, I understand now. Sometimes these processes are confusing for me.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s completely understandable. We’re happy to explain anything.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Thank you. Also, do I need to bring something tomorrow?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, please bring your OSHC card and some photo ID if you have it.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Passport is okay?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, a passport is perfect.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. And should I arrive exactly at , or earlier?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: We recommend arriving about 10 minutes early to complete a short form at reception.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Form… is that paper form or online?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: It’s a paper form at the clinic.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, paper is fine. I was worried maybe it’s online and I need link.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: No worries, we’ll give it to you when you arrive.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: One more thing, sorry. I keep asking many questions.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s completely fine, take your time.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: If I need medical certificate for work, can I ask doctor during appointment?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, you can request a medical certificate during your consultation.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay, perfect. Then please book that appointment.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Alright, I’ll just confirm your details. Could I have your full name, please?

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Yes. My name is Min-Jae Kim. Do you need spelling?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Yes, that would be helpful.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: M-I-N, dash, J-A-E. Last name K-I-M.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Great, thank you. So you’re booked in for tomorrow at am.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Okay. So tomorrow, am, bring OSHC card, arrive early, paper form.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: That’s exactly right.

turns.speaker: learner
turns.text: Alright, I feel clear now. Thank you for explaining everything slowly.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: You’re very welcome. We’ll see you tomorrow. Take care.
